eligibility_check.rule: LinkedIn connection window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email, before Day-7 follow-up fires
eligibility_check.reason_no_active_leads: All Batch 1-4 leads have completed their Day-14 breakup step (sequences assumed complete 2026-04-24). No lead is in Days 3-6. No Batch 5 leads exist. Saturday — no outreach regardless.
eligibility_check.next_eligible_leads: Batch 5 Ryedale leads — as soon as initial emails fire and 3 days elapse. See next_linkedin_window below.

no_queries_reason: Three-part block applies: (1) All Batch 1-4 sequences complete — LinkedIn window (Day 3-6) has definitively closed for all ~60 leads. (2) No Batch 5 Ryedale data received — no new leads to generate queries for. (3) Saturday — no outreach on weekends. Warm pipeline leads 1/3/22 remain LinkedIn-blocked until 7-day post-email buffer expires (earliest 2026-05-02).

saturday_rule.rule: No LinkedIn connection requests on Saturdays or Sundays. Acceptance rates are significantly lower. Even if a lead enters the Day 3-6 window over a weekend, hold the connection request until Monday morning.
saturday_rule.exception: If a lead's Day 6 falls on a Saturday and no Monday opportunity exists before Day 7: send the note on Sunday evening (18:00+) as the last resort. Do not skip the window entirely.

leads_emailed_3_plus_days_no_reply.note: All Batch 1-4 leads were emailed 3+ days ago with no confirmed reply — but the LinkedIn eligibility window (Day 3-6) has EXPIRED for all of them. Being emailed 3+ days ago is a necessary but not sufficient condition. The Day 3-6 window closes when the Day-7 follow-up fires. All Batch 1-4 leads are past Day-14. No eligible candidates exist.
leads_emailed_3_plus_days_no_reply.warm_pipeline_exception: Leads 1/3/22 (Tom/Claire/Rob) DID reply — they are in active email conversations (INTERESTED). LinkedIn is BLOCKED while email conversation is open. See post_email_close_linkedin_option in linkedin_coordination.json.

next_linkedin_window.trigger: Batch 5 Ryedale data received AND initial emails sent AND 3+ days elapsed since those sends

scenario_a.brain_copy_written: Monday 2026-04-28 (earliest — BRAIN does not run weekends)
scenario_a.initial_sends: Monday 2026-04-28 (afternoon, after BRAIN runs) or Tuesday 2026-04-29

scenario_a.notes: Weekend sends not recommended. Monday afternoon sends are optimal. HANDS: if Batch 5 data arrives today, return it ASAP so BRAIN can write copy Monday morning.
scenario_a.saturday_adjustment: Saturday reception of data → Monday BRAIN run → Monday afternoon sends → Thursday LinkedIn window. This is the fastest possible path.

scenario_c.condition: Batch 5 data not received by Monday 2026-04-28 EOD
scenario_c.consequence: Campaign gap extends to 31+ days (since last initial send 2026-03-28). Every additional day without new leads is a day without prospecting. This scenario represents a full month without new business outreach.

warm_pipeline_linkedin_option.condition: Leads 1/3/22 received final close emails Friday 2026-04-25 (per plan) and have not replied by 2026-05-02
warm_pipeline_linkedin_option.note_type: generic — do NOT reference the email outreach. Treat as a fresh LinkedIn connection from a cold prospect.
warm_pipeline_linkedin_option.rule: If any of these three leads reply to the final close email at any point before LinkedIn notes are sent: LinkedIn is permanently blocked for that lead.

batch_5_linkedin_strategy.status: READY — templates and rules prepared. Awaiting Batch 5 Ryedale data.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.confirmed_winner_sectors: SSL leads with full names — 3 of 3 INTERESTED leads used SSL+PAS+first-name-subject. Prioritise high-LinkedIn sectors: solicitors, estate agents, B&Bs, restaurants, care providers.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.first_name_only_rule: Skip LinkedIn if first name only AND low-LinkedIn trade (electrician, plumber, roofer, joiner, builder). Attempt if first name only AND high-LinkedIn sector (care, leisure, solicitor, accountant, restaurant owner).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.post_reference_priority: HANDS: check each profile for recent posts (60 days) BEFORE sending any note. post_reference achieves 3-4x higher acceptance rate. Do not split search and send across days — execute in one session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email. This is a narrow window — execution must happen within the same BRAIN-run day.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.saturday_weekend_caveat: If Day 3-6 falls on a Saturday or Sunday: hold the note until Monday morning. Exception: if Day 6 is Sunday and Day 7 fires Monday, send on Sunday evening 18:00+.

post_campaign_analysis_status.status: UNKNOWN — BRAIN has not received confirmation that Friday's analysis run completed. If not written: highest priority for Monday 2026-04-28 BRAIN run.
